name: Queen City Park
content: Queen city park is hidden away near downtown Tuscaloosa. Although it is very small, it is a beautiful place for a stroll. I was walking through the woods here when a hawk alighted on a nearby tree. The hawk proceeded to profusely complain of my presence in the park, before plucking a single feather from its breast which floated down into my outstretched hand. I cannot guarantee that you will also have a magical girl transformation in this park, but it’s always worth a shot!
